advisoryTemplate.recommendedAction: Inspect impeller, bearing, suction strainer, and cavitation margin; keep advisory-only until maintenance clears.
Run shadow replay, damp integral action, and review TIC-101/FIC-101 tuning before PLC gain changes.
Compare against a calibrated reference sensor and freeze autonomous optimization above 1.5 C residual.
Trim pump speed in bounded advisory mode when health risk is low; prioritize maintenance when risk is high.

advisoryJsonShape.controlBoundary: object identifying PLC/PID/SIS, OPC UA, MQTT, and Jneopallium responsibilities
advisoryJsonShape.faultProbabilities: object keyed by bearingDamage, cavitation, imbalance, sensorFault

deploymentNotes: Run first in offline replay, then shadow pilot, then advisory subscription.
Encapsulate diagnosis, economic basis, safety envelope, and bounded recommendations in Jneopallium neurons.
Keep autonomousAction=false until site-specific safety case and interlocks are validated.
Treat PLC/SIS interlocks, operator overrides, and management-of-change controls as authoritative.
